# HISTORY(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  history — display command history with timestamps

## SYNOPSIS
  history [n]

## DESCRIPTION
Shows a timestamped list of past commands. Each entry includes:
  - sequential index
  - ISO 8601 timestamp
  - command string
  - success/failure indicator

## EXAMPLES
  history
  history 50
  history 5

## SEE ALSO
  review, help, tutorial
